name: ponytail-tools
description: User-invoked router for all ponytail-related skills. Type this skill name to see which ponytail skill to use.

# Ponytail Tools Router

Index of the ponytail family. Invoke the right skill by name.

| Skill | Use when |
|---|---|
| `ponytail` | You want the simplest solution that actually works — apply lazy/YAGNI thinking to a coding task. |
| `ponytail-review` | You want a code review focused exclusively on over-engineering and what to delete. |
| `ponytail-audit` | You want a whole-repo audit for over-engineering. |
| `ponytail-debt` | You want to harvest every `ponytail:` comment into a debt ledger. |
| `ponytail-gain` | You want to see ponytail's measured impact scoreboard. |

These skills are user-invoked only. The agent can't fire them automatically —
you must type the specific skill name you want.
